summary: Frontend testing completed for Training UI fix. All 4 features verified working correctly: 1) Epoch counter increments from 1 to N during training (verified epochs 1-10), 2) Training graph appears after first epoch and updates in real-time, 3) Training status changes from 'ready' to 'training' to 'complete', 4) Batch size slider has min=1 and works correctly.
passed_tests: Test 1: Epoch counter increments during training - PASSED (verified epochs 1-10 in console logs)
Test 2: Training graph appears after first epoch - PASSED (graph appeared at check 1)
Test 3: Training status changes correctly - PASSED (status: ready -> training -> complete)
Test 4: Batch size slider has min=1 - PASSED (aria-valuemin='1', aria-valuemax='64')
Test 5: Training completes successfully - PASSED (Final Loss: 0.3967, Accuracy: 85.0%)
Test 6: yieldEvery: 'epoch' fix in tensorflowModel.js - VERIFIED (allows UI updates between epochs)
Test 7: tf.nextFrame() calls in callbacks - VERIFIED (ensures React can re-render)
critical_code_review_comments: tensorflowModel.js line 353: yieldEvery: 'epoch' correctly configured to allow UI updates
tensorflowModel.js lines 358, 363: tf.nextFrame() calls ensure React can process state updates
TrainingPanel.jsx line 1081-1082: onEpochBegin callback correctly updates currentEpoch state
TrainingPanel.jsx line 1090-1096: onEpochEnd callback correctly updates trainingHistory state
TrainingPanel.jsx line 2311: Epoch counter display shows 'Epoch {currentEpoch}/{epochs}' during training
TrainingPanel.jsx line 2369: Batch size slider has min={1} correctly configured
context_for_next_testing_agent: Training UI fix verified working. The yieldEvery: 'epoch' and tf.nextFrame() calls in tensorflowModel.js allow React to update UI during TensorFlow.js training. Epoch counter increments correctly (1-10), graph appears during training, status changes from training to complete. Batch size slider has min=1. Note: WebGL is unavailable in headless browser but TensorFlow.js falls back to CPU backend which works correctly for training.
